# PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion.current

**Case**

Request the most recent version of the video asset, reflecting all edits.

## Declaration

```swift
case current
```

## Discussion

The resulting video is the rendered output from all previously made adjustments.

## Constants

- **PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion.original**: Request a version of the video asset without adjustments.
